blurb: The Royal Institute of International Affairs (Chatham House); this feed tracks its International Security Programme, led by Dr Marion Messmer, covering arms control, nuclear policy and emerging-tech security.

news.title: Avoiding a new nuclear arms race
news.summary: Chatham House item noting Dr Marion Messmer (International Security Programme) provided arms-control evidence; flags limited prospects for formal arms control after New START's expiry in early 2026.

news.title: Director of Chatham House UK in the World Programme gives evidence at Parliament Foreign Affairs Committee
news.summary: First-party press: Olivia O'Sullivan gave evidence at Parliament on 9 June 2026 on UK security planning, defence priorities vs conflict prevention, and the Integrated Security Fund. (Date approximate from search 'about 2 weeks ago' on 2026-06-27.)

news.title: Chatham House fellow provides evidence to UK Parliament Joint Select Committee on the National Security Strategy
news.summary: First-party press: Senior Research Fellow Dr Marion Messmer (International Security Programme) provided evidence to the UK Parliament's Joint Select Committee on the National Security Strategy on 22 October 2025.

notes: [harvest 2026-06-27] Chatham House is Cloudflare-gated; the general feed surfaced no clearly AI-specific items this pass. Left empty rather than logging off-topic foreign-policy pieces. Needs a targeted AI-programme page (browser fetch).
